info.title: Opportunity Service
info.description:
Opportunity Management using Guided Selling brings together multiple processes like creating opportunities, qualifying deals and much more in an optimized workspace. It helps you identify the right opportunities, working through the sales cycle across various phases, and ultimately winning the deal.

Use this API to view, create, and manage your opportunities.

servers.description: Example of server url is https://my1234567.crm.cloud.sap

OpportunityReasonforStatusqueryresponse.title: Opportunity Reason for Status query response

OpportunitySalesPhaseProgressqueryrespon.title: Opportunity Sales Phase Progress query response

get.summary: Retrieve opportunity information from the system.
get.description: Specify query parameters to return desired opportunity records from the system.

parameters.name: $top
parameters.description: Show only the first n opportunities.

parameters.name: $search
parameters.description: Search for a string within opportunity.

parameters.name: $query
parameters.description: Indicates the query to be used by opportunity service.

400.description:
Bad Request.

The server cannot process the request due to a client error. For example, an invalid request.

401.description:
Unauthorized.

This error is caused when the request has not been applied because there are no valid authentication credentials for the target resource.

403.description:
Forbidden.

This client error code indicates that the server understood the request but refuses to authorize it.

500.description:
Internal Server Error.

Failed to read the opportunity.

post.description: Send opportunity information to the system to create a new opportunity entity.

patch.description: Update opportunity attributes in the system.

parameters.name: If-Match
parameters.description: Used for conflict management when a consumer tries to update a resource. This parameter checks if the state of the resource known to the client (etag) matches the state on the server and if true, allows the update to continue.

200.description:
Opportunity updated.

The opportunity was updated successfully.

400.description:
Bad Request.

The server cannot process the request due to a client error. For example, an invalid request.

500.description:
Internal Server Error.

Failed to update the opportunity.

204.description:
Opportunity deleted.

The opportunity was deleted successfully.
